last_cycle.reason: Two validators unified via delegation; all 4 themes exit 0 on both, new 10-test suite passes alongside existing 20 tests, malformed inputs rejected with actionable errors. Backward compat preserved.

Root cause correctly diagnosed as pre-existing ppt-master bug (icon-not-found left <use data-icon> placeholder, native converter refused <use>). Strip helper + stderr warning shipped; all 3 examples run end-to-end in --only native / --only legacy / default modes with PPTX + contrast_audit.json emitted. New 6 smoke tests added, all 36 tests pass.

message_to_user: P0 + P1 全部完成,接受所有交付,結束團隊計畫。
